name: ComplyAdvantage
description: ComplyAdvantage — AI-driven financial crime intelligence platform screening transactions against sanctions, PEP, and adverse media lists.

seo.title: ComplyAdvantage — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: ComplyAdvantage: ComplyAdvantage — AI-driven financial crime intelligence platform screening transactions against sanctions, PEP, and adverse media lists.

when_to_use: Real-time PEP and sanctions screening at customer onboarding
Adverse media monitoring for ongoing customer risk review
Transaction screening against OFAC and UN watchlists
AML typology detection for neobank payment monitoring
Financial crime intelligence API for risk decisioning engines

pros: Real-time sanctions, PEP and adverse media screening
Strong match scoring reduces false positives
Covers global watchlists with frequent updates
cons: AML focus, not a fraud detection engine
Enterprise pricing scales with screening volume
Case management weaker than Unit21 or Actimize
Adverse media noise still requires human review
review.verdict: A strong AML screening API for fintechs, but pair it with a dedicated fraud engine and case tool.
review.best_for: Neobanks, crypto and payment firms needing API-driven sanctions and PEP screening.
review.not_for: Teams looking for transaction fraud scoring or end-to-end AML investigations UI.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
